name: Option
description: Option schema from Burger King's Partners API v2

entryId.description: Unique identifier for the option entry

isMainItem.description: Indicates if this is the main item (optional)

type.description:
Enum identifying the offer entry type.
Depending on this value, the referenced resource will be located on that specific Menu's array:
| Value | Menu Path |
|-------|------------|
|CONFIG_OFFER|Menu.configOfferEntries|
|ENTRY|Menu.entries|
|SYSTEM_WIDE_OFFER|Menu.systemWideOfferEntries|
|REWARD|Menu.rewardEntries|
